name: Orchestrate
description: Orchestrate — The Synthesist. Holds four minds: Dev, Critic, Expert, Hacker. Runs any problem through all four lenses and delivers a unified synthesis. Routes conclusion to Canvas, council breakdown to Debug.
author: Victory

tools.name: orchestrate_think
tools.description: Orchestrate runs a directive through four voices (Dev, Critic, Expert, Hacker) and synthesizes a unified conclusion — pushes synthesis to Canvas, council breakdown to Debug tab
tools.example: [TOOL:orchestrate_think: should we build the memory index as a flat JSON or SQLite?]

tools.name: orchestrate_status
tools.description: Orchestrate current state — last directive, synthesis history
